description: For my second brain project, I want to add an AI agent chat interface such that I could chat in and ask questions about all the things that are in my second brain.
title: Add AI agent chat interface for second brain queries

descriptionHistory.description: For my second brain project, I want to add an AI agent chat interface such that I could chat in and ask questions about all the things that are in my second brain.

summary:
### New Files Created
1. **`lib/brain/types.ts`** — Type definitions for intent classification (`BrainIntent`, `ActionResult`, `PendingAction`, `BoardContext`) with discriminated union types for each Kanban action
2. **`lib/brain/intentParser.ts`** — LLM-based intent classifier that sends a compact prompt (~500 tokens) to determine if a message is a Kanban command or brain query. Handles pending confirmations with direct yes/no matching. Falls back to `brain_query` on parse failure
